---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Browser (if frontend): (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125)
- Docker version: (e.g. 25.0.3)
- Node.js version: (e.g. 20.11)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.12)

## Logs
